title: James Dragov
summary: A rogue lieutenant of Aaron Keener who leads the Rikers sub-group operating in Lower Manhattan.

claims.text: The Warlords of New York faction recap identifies James Dragov as leader of the Rikers sub-group in Lower Manhattan.
The same official recap identifies Dragov as one of Aaron Keener's rogue lieutenants.

paragraphs.text: Dragov connects Keener's rogue-agent network to the reorganized Rikers encountered in Lower Manhattan.

verification.notes: Mission outcome and personal history remain outside this opening-premise record.
